ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_col Int32 AFTER existing_col;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_col Nullable(Int32) FIRST;
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN non_existent_col IF EXISTS;
ALTER TABLE test_table RENAME COLUMN old_col TO new_col IF EXISTS;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN existing_col Float64 DEFAULT 0.0;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN nullable_col Nullable(Int32) DEFAULT 100;
ALTER TABLE test_table RESET COLUMN settings_col;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN nested_col Array(Int32) AFTER existing_col;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN mat_col MATERIALIZED (existing_col * 2);
ALTER TABLE test_table UPDATE existing_col = NULL WHERE condition;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN existing_col UInt32 DEFAULT 1, MODIFY COLUMN another_col String;
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN materialized_view_col IF EXISTS;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN test_col String CODEC(ZIP);
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN comment_col String COMMENT 'This is a comment';
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN default_col Int32 DEFAULT 50 AFTER existing_col;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN key_col DateTime DEFAULT now() IF EXISTS;
ALTER TABLE test_table RENAME COLUMN key_col TO new_key_col IF EXISTS;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN complex_array_col Array(Nullable(Int32)) DEFAULT [];
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN dependent_col IF EXISTS;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN large_col String DEFAULT '' CODEC(DELTA(1));
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN y_col Int32 TTL 1 YEAR;
